facts: Her father, Robert Harper, died two weeks ago in Madison County.
A sibling says the will is being challenged.
The family mentioned a probate court deadline next week.
Megan wants help sorting out the estate administration and the dispute.
Ortega HVAC Services completed a commercial service job for Briarwood Property Management, LLC.
A demand email was sent but no payment has arrived.
Luis wants help understanding options for a payment dispute.
Terry was arrested last night after a traffic stop.
A hearing is scheduled for tomorrow morning.
He asked for immediate help with the criminal charge.
This is outside the firm's stated practice areas.

phone_transcript.speaker: Voice Layer
phone_transcript.text: Thanks for calling GuideHerd Legal Intake. I can help capture the basics. What is your name and what is this about?

phone_transcript.speaker: Caller
phone_transcript.text: I'm Sarah Whitfield. I'm calling about my dad, Daniel Whitfield. He died last Sunday, and now there is a mess with his house, his trust, and my stepmother.

phone_transcript.speaker: Voice Layer
phone_transcript.text: I understand. Is there already a probate case or any court hearing scheduled?

phone_transcript.speaker: Caller
phone_transcript.text: Not that I know of. My stepmother, Lena Whitfield, keeps saying she can handle it, but my cousin Marcus Reed told me she is trying to move money out of a joint account and list the cabin in Limestone County without talking to the rest of us.

phone_transcript.speaker: Voice Layer
phone_transcript.text: Are there any deadlines, emergency hearings, or other family issues we should flag?

phone_transcript.speaker: Caller
phone_transcript.text: Yes. My mom, Ruth Whitfield, has an emergency guardianship hearing next Tuesday because her dementia has gotten worse. I think there may be a trust issue tied to the deed too. I have a photo of the deed and the account statements, but I don't know what matters most.

phone_transcript.speaker: Voice Layer
phone_transcript.text: That is helpful. Do you know the county or court handling the guardianship hearing, and has anyone already filed anything?

phone_transcript.speaker: Caller
phone_transcript.text: I only know it is in Limestone County. Nobody has given me a case number yet. I just need someone to tell me who can stop the house sale and whether the trust is valid.

facts: Caller reports that Daniel Whitfield died last Sunday.
The family believes there may be a probate, trust, and deed issue tied to the estate.
Stepmother Lena Whitfield is allegedly moving money from a joint account and listing a cabin in Limestone County.
Marcus Reed is a cousin who relayed the concern about the property sale.
Ruth Whitfield has an emergency guardianship hearing next Tuesday because of worsening dementia.
The caller has a photo of the deed and account statements but no case number yet.

witnesses_or_other_names: unknown family member on the deed
